subject: Fermi GBM trigger 516459580/170514541 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico & INFN Bari)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 516459580/170514541
at 12:59:35.75 UT on 14 May 2017, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
